tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild hypoglycemia, elevated creatinine, low CO₂, and significant proteinuria with low urine specific gravity, glucosuria, and ketonuria. Urine is cloudy, brown, and ammoniacal, but without hematuria, nitrites, or leukocytes. Findings suggest impaired renal function, possibly acute or chronic kidney disease with tubular dysfunction (suggested by glucosuria and low specific gravity), and metabolic derangements. Clinical correlation and further nephrological evaluation are recommended.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
